mapper.select: SELECT board_id AS boardId, category, title, content, member_id AS memberId, view_count AS viewCount, like_count AS likeCount, comment_count AS commentCount, is_artist_post AS artistPost, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM board.board WHERE board_id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board.board ( category, title, content, member_id, is_artist_post, view_count, like_count, comment_count, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{category}, #{title}, #{content}, #{memberId}, #{artistPost}, 0, 0, 0, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE board.board SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE board_id = #{id}
UPDATE board.board SET category = #{category}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE board_id = #{boardId} AND member_id = #{memberId}
